title: Software Engineer - API
keyResponsibilities: Design, build, and maintain efficient, reusable, reliable and secure code
Improve tools and processes related to API development
Create documentation for the APIs, tools and processes that you work on
Modify existing APIs and create new APIs using both Oracle ADF BC REST as well as Jersey frameworks
Development at the database level to support the APIs

companyResearch.culture: CMIC is headquartered in Toronto and focuses on the Construction industry. They offer a comprehensive platform for construction companies. Benefits include wellness programs, social events, and RRSP matching. They are located on York University's campus and emphasize health and wellness.
